channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network MAO 动画 Previews 2nd Part, 新作 Theme Songs Video
item.description: Reina Ueda performs new ending song "Tayutau" ― The official website for Sunrise's television anime based on the MAO manga by Rumiko Takahashi revealed a new promotional video and the ending theme... | 来源: ANN | 原文: MAO Anime Previews 2nd Part, New Theme Songs in Video
